name: jiangyue-website-imagegen
description: Codex skill plugin for Jiangyue website visual production from clear page strategy or image roles, with hard visual QA, physical plausibility, and archive discipline.

interface.longDescription: A Jiangyue Technology Codex skill for producing, editing, reviewing, and packaging website visuals from clear page strategy or image roles, with physical plausibility, visual hard stops, rendered-result inspection, and return-to-planner checks.
defaultPrompt: Use $jiangyue-website-imagegen to create a Jiangyue website visual from a confirmed image request brief.
Use $jiangyue-website-imagegen to turn a rough image idea into a production brief after page strategy is clear.
Use $jiangyue-website-imagegen to review a failed Jiangyue website image and decide whether to revise visually or return to planner.
